'''nawowo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iftaar|iftaar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iftaar|iftaar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nawowo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næweweth|næweweth]] || [[word:næwewej|næwewej]] || [[word:næwewesh|næwewesh]] || [[word:næwewe|næwewe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nawowowoth|nawowowoth]] || [[word:nawowowoj|nawowowoj]] || [[word:nawowowosh|nawowowosh]] || [[word:nawowowo|nawowowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nawowoth|nawowoth]] || [[word:nawowoj|nawowoj]] || [[word:nawowosh|nawowosh]] || [[word:nawowo|nawowo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nawofwofth|nawofwofth]] || [[word:nawofwofj|nawofwofj]] || [[word:nawofwofsh|nawofwofsh]] || [[word:nawofwof|nawofwof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nawowotho|nawowotho]] || [[word:nawowojo|nawowojo]] || [[word:nawowosho|nawowosho]] || [[word:nawowoko|nawowoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nawowoth|nawowoth]] || [[word:nawowoj|nawowoj]] || [[word:nawowosh|nawowosh]] || [[word:nawowo|nawowo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nawowothol|nawowothol]] || [[word:nawowojol|nawowojol]] || [[word:nawowoshol|nawowoshol]] || [[word:nawowokol|nawowokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nawowoothotho|nawowoothotho]] || [[word:nawowoojojo|nawowoojojo]] || [[word:nawowooshosho|nawowooshosho]] || [[word:nawowooko|nawowooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nawowothon|nawowothon]] || [[word:nawowojon|nawowojon]] || [[word:nawowoshon|nawowoshon]] || [[word:nawowokon|nawowokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nawowothooro|nawowothooro]] || [[word:nawowojooro|nawowojooro]] || [[word:nawowoshooro|nawowoshooro]] || [[word:nawowokooro|nawowokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d5728ff}}
